zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Swynnerton於大約1371年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，她的父親Robert de Swynnerton31歲，母親Elizabeth Beke28歲。她於1390年12月8日之後與Sir William Ipstones結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年6月24日在英國爾克里夫頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Swynnerton于大约1371年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，她的父亲Robert de Swynnerton31岁，母亲Elizabeth Beke28岁。她于1390年12月8日之后与Sir William Ipstones结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年6月24日在英国爾克里夫頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Swynnerton was born about 1371, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Swynnerton, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Beke, was 28. She married Sir William Ipstones after 8 December 1390. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 24 June 1428, in Clifton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Swynnerton est née environ 1371, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Swynnerton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Beke, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Ipstones après 8 décembre 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1428, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Swynnerton um 1371 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Swynnerton 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Beke 28. Sie hat nach 8. Dezember 1390 Sir William Ipstones geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Juni 1428 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Clifton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Swynnerton è nata il circa 1371 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Swynnerton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Beke, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Ipstones dopo il 8 dicembre 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 giugno 1428, nel Clifton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Swynnertonが約1371年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Swynnertonは31歳，母Elizabeth Bekeは28歳であった。1390年12月8日以後にSir William Ipstonesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年6月24日にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Swynnerton(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Swynnerton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Beke(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1390년 12월 8일 이후 Sir William Ipstones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 6월 24일 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Swynnerton nasceu aproximadamente 1371, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Swynnerton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Beke, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Ipstones após 8 de dezembro de 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1428, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Swynnerton родилась около 1371 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Swynnerton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Beke, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Ipstones после 8 декабрь 1390 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 июня 1428 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Swynnerton nació aproximadamente 1371, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Swynnerton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Beke, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Ipstones después de 8 de diciembre de 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de junio de 1428, en Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
